overview: Employee Performance Dashboard for Frootle India Pvt. Ltd. with a new Lapses Trend Analysis tab providing organization-wide lapse analytics.
features: Employee profiles with SWOT, PULSE, PRISM, Personality Analysis
Sales Trends with multi-year comparison and product performance
Feedback tab with Issue Insights and Region Analysis
Suggestions & Issues with live sheet sync
Uploads with Excel templates and validation
Export to Excel across all tabs
Lapses Trend Analysis with KPIs, trends, regional breakdown, and actionable insights
